mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders ( id,number, status, user_id, address_book_id, consignee,phone,address, amount,pay_amount, pay_method, order_time,delivery_time, remark,tableware_status,tableware_number ) VALUES ( #{id},#{number}, #{status}, #{userId}, #{addressBookId}, #{consignee},#{phone},#{address}, #{amount},#{payAmount}, #{payMethod}, #{orderTime}, #{deliveryTime}, #{remark},#{tablewareStatus},#{tablewareNumber} )
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{orderId}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
AND status = #{status}
